commands_run: python -B -m pytest tests\test_build_assist_cloud.py tests\test_provider_orchestrator.py tests\test_redaction_and_cloud_adapters.py tests\test_cloud_code_proposal.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
decisions: Wabi build-assist cloud is temporary construction scaffolding, not final runtime identity.
NVIDIA default for build-assist is nano-30b; super/ultra remain manual review.
Cloud output remains proposal-only and must validate locally before PatchPlan/TaskSpec.
pending: Optional live NVIDIA smoke with WABI_BUILD_ASSIST_CLOUD=1 and WABI_ALLOW_CLOUD_PROVIDERS=1, using a non-private prompt.
Expose build-assist state in UI if the operator needs a visual cockpit.
next_action: Run one reviewed NVIDIA nano-30b proposal smoke on a synthetic prompt, then inspect cloud_provider_called and usage log without applying source changes.
